subcodes.first_line: The Book sent down by the Wronged One in the Prison of 'Akká unto him who hath turned toward the Dayspring of Manifestation and hath believed in God, the Single One [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم فی سجن عکا لمن اقبل الی مشرق الظهور و آمن بالله الفرد
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @personal instructions, @martyrs and martyrdom, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
